arts.ttl: Premier League explain why Myles Lewis-Skelly was sent off for Arsenal against Wolves
arts.sum: The Premier League explain why Myles Lewis-Skelly was shown a red card for Arsenal against Wolves.

arts.ttl: Arsenal stars fume at 'disgraceful' Michael Oliver after Myles Lewis-Skelly red card
arts.sum: Arsenal stars were up in arms over the decision to send off Myles Lewis-Skelly, with Declan Rice, Gabriel Magalhaes and William Saliba looking furious as they chased after Michael Oliver to protest

arts.ttl: Premier League issue statement on 'baffling' red card for Arsenal star Myles Lewis-Skelly
arts.sum: Arsenal fans were left stunned when Myles Lewis-Skelly was shown a controversial red card in the first half of Saturday's match against Wolves, but the decision has been explained

arts.ttl: Why was Arsenal’s Myles Lewis-Skelly sent off against Wolves?
arts.sum: Lewis-Skelly was sent off in the 43rd minute for a foul on Matt Doherty

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Premier League explain controversial decision to show Myles Lewis-Skelly red card against Wolves
arts.sum: The Premier League have explained the decision to show Myles Lewis-Skelly a straight red card in Arsenal’s match against Wolves.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal ace Myles Lewis-Skelley was sent off vs Wolves in controversial referee decision
arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelley was sent off for Arsenal right on the stroke of half-time after Michael Oliver deemed his tackle on Matt Doherty worthy of a straight red card. Explaining the decision via the official Match Centre account on X (formerly Twitter), the league said: "The referee’s call of a red card for Lewis-Skelly was checked and confirmed by VAR, who deemed his challenge to have been serious foul play."

arts.ttl: Fans left stunned by Myles Lewis-Skelly's controversial RED CARD against Wolves as Tim Sherwood loses his mind over 'ridiculous' call on Soccer Saturday
arts.sum: Tim Sherwood was left shocked as Arsenal youngster Myles Lewis-Skelly received a straight red card against Wolves.

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha ‘not for sale’ amid Arsenal and Forest transfer interest
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha won’t be sold in the January transfer window despite being linked with moves to Arsenal and Nottingham Forest, Wolves boss Vitor Pereira has said. The Brazil international has been a standout performer on a poor Wanderers team this season, recording 10 goals and four assists in 21 Premier League appearances. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains Martin Odegaard, Mikel Merino absences from Arsenal's clash with Wolves amid Man City fear
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta explains the reasons for Martin Odegaard and Mikel Merino's unexpected absences from the Gunners' squad to face Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Fabio Silva plays Las Palmas peace maker as teammate loses the rag in red card ref rant
arts.sum: The former Rangers loanee's form has seen him linked with Atletico Madrid this window
